name: Buenos Aires Tango Festival
traditions: Tango dance competitions (Mundial de Tango); milongas (dance events); outdoor performances; tango orchestra concerts; dance workshops.
historicalBackground: Tango originated in the working-class neighborhoods of Buenos Aires and Montevideo in the late 19th century, blending European, African, and indigenous influences.
description: The world's premier tango event, celebrating Argentina's iconic dance with competitions, milongas, and performances across Buenos Aires.
